title: シェアリング☆メモリー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Smart Falcon and I are walking through
the shopping district on our way back from an
outing, when...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ah! It's this shop! This really takes me back!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You see, before my first ever street
performance...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I came here by myself to have a ham katsu while I
prayed to get over my nerves.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It was an important moment on my way to
becoming an Umadol! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I know! Why don't we get a ham katsu since
we're here?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I want you to taste the flavor I remember so
well! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We buy two ham katsus and eat them together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ooh, yum! It's just as crunchy as I remember!
choice_data_list: The sauce is pretty good too!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Pffft! Ahaha! You look like a hamster with all that
food stuffed in your mouth!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But I'm super happy you like it so much! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...That was great!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's a bit strange, though... It could just be my
imagination, but...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I think it was even better than before!
choice_data_list: Maybe because you had company this time?
I'm sure the shopkeeper has been hard at work.
I'm sure the shopkeeper has been hard at work.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I think it was even better than before!
choice_data_list: Maybe because you had company this time?
I'm sure the shopkeeper has been hard at work.
I'm sure the shopkeeper has been hard at work.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! They say food tastes better when you
share it with someone, right?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But in my case, it's not because of just anyone...
It's because I shared it with you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. If you don't know, I'm not telling!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But if it's okay with you, there is one little favor
I'd like to ask.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I want you to always remember having ham katsu
with me today.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I know it might not seem like a big deal, but
memories like this add up...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And all together, they become a great source of
motivation for achieving your dreams!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Of course! ☆ After all...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's exactly what fuels me to chase my dream
of becoming the cutest top Umadol! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, we take a leisurely stroll back to the
academy beneath the setting sun.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I see! So you're saying this is the result of their
dedication to their craft?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If even a memorable flavor like that can change, I
need to be able to change too...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If I want to become the cutest top Umadol, then
I'll have to work even harder!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Thanks, Trainer! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All right! I'm feeling pumped up!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I know today's supposed to be a rest day, but I
want to do some extra training right away!
choice_data_list:
Okay, I'll think up a training regimen while we
walk back.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yes! Thanks a lot!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'd like something I can do before curfew.
Something crisp, but also with some real meat to
it...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Just like the ham katsu we had! Now, let's get
moving, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon hurries me along and we end up
running back to campus beneath the setting sun.
